android.widget.TextView.text: Gunfire Strikes Rihanna's Beverly Hills Home
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Rihanna's Beverly Hills mansion was struck by gunfire, leading to the arrest of a woman, while the singer remained unharmed.
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Woman Who Shot at Rihanna's Home Was Previously Baker Acted, Lost Custody of Kid
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: Woman Who Was Identified For Firing Shots At Rihanna’s Home Left Disturbing Social Media Posts About The Singer
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: What’s your take on this? Join the talk!
android.widget.TextView.heading: false

android.widget.TextView.text: I don't like her or her music. Isn't she the one that attempted to put out a country music album. Texas has her own type of country music that can't be immitated by someone that knows nothing about our state and what it means to be a Texan!
android.widget.TextView.heading: false
